assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Extended channel provides up to **24 months of support**' and mentions 'Extended support period (24 months vs standard 14 months)'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Additional cost only during the extended support period (months 15-24)' and details cost implications in a dedicated section

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response states 'Same version availability timing as Regular channel — no faster access to new features' indicating same versions but different availability duration

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: While the response mentions 'Same version availability timing as Regular channel — no faster access to new features', it doesn't explicitly warn about missing new features or accumulating technical debt from staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes pre-migration check command to verify if 1.31 is available in Extended channel and explicitly states 'Extended support: Available for 1.31'

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention compliance requirements or slow internal change processes as use cases for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'except at end of extended support' enforcement and includes best practices about not waiting until final EoS enforcement, indicating upgrades are still required within the 24-month window

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '**Manual control over minor version upgrades** — control plane minor upgrades are NOT automated (except at end of extended support)' and provides detailed manual upgrade workflow
